content:
Float Chat | Python, LangGraph, Gemini, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
2025
– Pioneered a novel data retrieval paradigm for geospatial oceanographic data by replacing traditional
RAG/embeddings with MongoDB geospatial filtering + PostgreSQL structured retrieval, recognizing
that coordinate-based float data requires spatial indexing rather than semantic similarity search.
– Architected a 3-tier multi-agent system (Decomposition, Filter, SQL agents) using LangGraph where
agents autonomously route queries to appropriate data access patterns MongoDB for location/metadata
filtering, PostgreSQL for profile.
AI-Powered Conversational ChatBot | Python, Quart, LangChain
2026
– Developed a high-performance real-time conversational AI backend with WebSocket bi-directional com-
munication, LLM streaming, and cloud-based data persistence using Supabase PostgreSQL.
– Integrated Google Gemini AI with LangChain/LangGraph for tool-calling capabilities including weather
queries (OpenWeather API) and web search (SerpAPI) with asynchronous architecture for scalable
concurrent connections.
FarmForecast | Kotlin, TensorFlow, Sklearn
2024
– Developed an offline Android application enabling farmers to detect crop diseases from a single photo
with 90%+ accuracy.
– Implemented crop recommendations based on soil parameters to optimize yield.
– Integrated a feature to find and track real-time crop prices, assisting farmers in selling at optimal market
rates.
